{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "System Engineer",
  "description": "GZI is the first Alumunium beverage can manufacturing company in&nbsp; West Africa with state of the art factories&nbsp; in Aba, Agbara and South Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: System Engineer

Job Location: Agbara, Ogun
Job type: Full-time

Roles &amp; Responsibilities


	&nbsp;Performing administration and maintenance of the company&#39;s infrastructure in order to ensure operational performance, capacity, and implementation of future technology infrastructure strategy.
	Planning, directing, and coordinating the design, installation, and connectivity of computer systems and network infrastructure to ensure the stable operation of the organization&#39;s IT assets.
	This includes developing, configuring, maintaining, monitoring, supporting, and optimizing all new and existing network hardware, software, and communication links. Assist in managing and ensuring effectiveness of security solutions, including firewalls, anti-virus solutions, and intrusion detection systems.
	Ensuring that the production network and all associated technology services and infrastructure operate efficiently, perform within agreed targets and deliver a secure platform for the organization to carry out its business.
	Responsible for delivering support within agreed SLAs and to a high degree of customer satisfaction.
	Assist in managing implementation of identified projects based on a broad and detailed knowledge of current and emerging technologies and to provide technical input into projects undertaken by or impacting on the company.
	Proactively ensure the highest levels of systems and infrastructure availability
	Monitor and test application performance for potential bottlenecks, identify possible solutions, and work with developers to implement those fixes
	Monitors to ensure data integrity and assurance
	Provides technical support to staff/IT end users requiring assistance.


Required Education/ Qualification


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree or HND in Computer Science, Information Technology or a related discipline
	6+ years&#39; experience in system engineering and IT support
	Relevant experience in VMware virtualization platform.
	Conversant in Information Technology Infrastructure Library (ITIL) processes, procedures, and roles required.
	Experience managing and configuring enterprise-wide LANS, WANS, WLANs, VPNs.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruit@gzican.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-19",

System Engineer Job at GZI Industries




        
    

        
        GZI is the first Alumunium beverage can manufacturing company in  West Africa with state of the art factories  in Aba, Agbara and South Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: System Engineer

Job Location: Agbara, Ogun
Job type: Full-time

Roles & Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	 Performing administration and maintenance of the company's infrastructure in order to ensure operational performance, capacity, and implementation of future technology infrastructure strategy.
	Planning, directing, and coordinating the design, installation, and connectivity of computer systems and network infrastructure to ensure the stable operation of the organization's IT assets.
	This includes developing, configuring, maintaining, monitoring, supporting, and optimizing all new and existing network hardware, software, and communication links. Assist in managing and ensuring effectiveness of security solutions, including firewalls, anti-virus solutions, and intrusion detection systems.
	Ensuring that the production network and all associated technology services and infrastructure operate efficiently, perform within agreed targets and deliver a secure platform for the organization to carry out its business.
	Responsible for delivering support within agreed SLAs and to a high degree of customer satisfaction.
	Assist in managing implementation of identified projects based on a broad and detailed knowledge of current and emerging technologies and to provide technical input into projects undertaken by or impacting on the company.
	Proactively ensure the highest levels of systems and infrastructure availability
	Monitor and test application performance for potential bottlenecks, identify possible solutions, and work with developers to implement those fixes
	Monitors to ensure data integrity and assurance
	Provides technical support to staff/IT end users requiring assistance.


Required Education/ Qualification


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree or HND in Computer Science, Information Technology or a related discipline
	6+ years' experience in system engineering and IT support
	Relevant experience in VMware virtualization platform.
	Conversant in Information Technology Infrastructure Library (ITIL) processes, procedures, and roles required.
	Experience managing and configuring enterprise-wide LANS, WANS, WLANs, VPNs.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager (Hybrid)",
  "description": "FMR Agency is a leading recruitment and talent solutions firm, connecting skilled professionals with top organizations across Nigeria. We specialize in sourcing talent for key sectors, ensuring our clients build high-performing teams that drive business growth.

FMR Agency offers Human Resources to businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager (Hybrid)

Job Location: Yaba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are hiring a creative and strategic Social Media Manager to oversee brand visibility, audience engagement, and marketing objectives across multiple platforms.
	This role goes beyond posting content, it requires someone who understands how social media drives growth, builds trust, and supports business goals.
	You will work closely with designers, videographers, and strategists to create compelling campaigns, manage daily activities, and track performance to ensure measurable impact.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute social media content plans aligned with brand goals
	Create campaign concepts, content briefs, and engaging captions
	Manage daily activities across Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, X, TikTok, and emerging platforms
	Monitor trends, conversations, and opportunities relevant to client brands
	Collaborate with creative teams to bring ideas to life
	Track performance metrics and provide insights for improvement
	Support brand events and campaign activations with live coverage and engagement.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s Degree
	Proven experience managing social media for brands or businesses
	Strong understanding of major platforms and emerging trends
	Excellent content planning, storytelling, and writing skills
	Ability to translate business goals into engaging content ideas
	Strong communication and organizational skills
	Agency experience is an added advantage.


We Are Looking For Someone Who:


	Is proactive and resourceful
	Understands the difference between posting content and building a brand
	Can work independently and take ownership of results
	Pays attention to detail and delivers consistently
	Enjoys learning and staying ahead of social media trends.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-12",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-18",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "FMR Agency"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",

Social Media Manager (Hybrid) Job at FMR Agency




        
    

        
        FMR Agency is a leading recruitment and talent solutions firm, connecting skilled professionals with top organizations across Nigeria. We specialize in sourcing talent for key sectors, ensuring our clients build high-performing teams that drive business growth.

FMR Agency offers Human Resources to businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager (Hybrid)

Job Location: Yaba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are hiring a creative and strategic Social Media Manager to oversee brand visibility, audience engagement, and marketing objectives across multiple platforms.
	This role goes beyond posting content, it requires someone who understands how social media drives growth, builds trust, and supports business goals.
	You will work closely with designers, videographers, and strategists to create compelling campaigns, manage daily activities, and track performance to ensure measurable impact.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute social media content plans aligned with brand goals
	Create campaign concepts, content briefs, and engaging captions
	Manage daily activities across Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, X, TikTok, and emerging platforms
	Monitor trends, conversations, and opportunities relevant to client brands
	Collaborate with creative teams to bring ideas to life
	Track performance metrics and provide insights for improvement
	Support brand events and campaign activations with live coverage and engagement.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s Degree
	Proven experience managing social media for brands or businesses
	Strong understanding of major platforms and emerging trends
	Excellent content planning, storytelling, and writing skills
	Ability to translate business goals into engaging content ideas
	Strong communication and organizational skills
	Agency experience is an added advantage.


We Are Looking For Someone Who:


	Is proactive and resourceful
	Understands the difference between posting content and building a brand
	Can work independently and take ownership of results
	Pays attention to detail and delivers consistently
	Enjoys learning and staying ahead of social media trends.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Assistant Salesman Job at Ascentech Services Limited




        
    

        
        Ascentech services Limited is a full-fledged Human Resource Solution Provider incorporated in 2013 with its Head Office in Lagos, Nigeria. We are committed to forging long-term partnerships with our clients by creating and delivering robust and flexible services that address the changing needs of their business through our core offerings.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Salesman

Job Locations: Ojo, Lagos Island, Okokomaiko & Badagry - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Salesman / Sales Supervisor
Industry: FMCG / Manufacturing

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a reliable and hardworking Assistant Salesman to support daily sales and distribution operations.
	The successful candidate will assist in product delivery, merchandising, stock handling, and customer service while ensuring products are delivered efficiently and company standards are maintained.


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE, WAEC, or NECO qualification.
	Previous experience in a similar role within the FMCG, manufacturing, or distribution sector is an added advantage.
	Ability to read, write, and perform basic calculations.
	Physically fit and capable of handling manual loading and unloading activities.
	Must possess a valid Driver’s License and LASDRI card.
	Ability to drive and operate a manual transmission vehicle.
	Honest, dependable, and able to work effectively within a team.


Key Competencies:


	Teamwork and collaboration
	Customer service orientation
	Attention to detail and accuracy
	Integrity and accountability
	Time management and reliability
	Good communication skills.


Salary
N110,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Quantity Surveyor (Dialux & Lighting Design)",
  "description": "Accretio Africa, an HR Consulting Firm, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quantity Surveyor (Dialux &amp; Lighting Design)
Job Location: Onikan, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a skilled Quantity Surveyor with hands-on experience in Dialux Evo and lighting project estimation.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for preparing lighting designs, conducting quantity take-offs, developing BOQs, preparing project cost estimates, and supporting the successful execution of lighting projects.


Job Responsibilities


	Develop lighting layouts and calculations in line with project requirements.
	Prepare Bills of Quantities (BOQs) and material schedules.
	Conduct quantity take-offs from drawings and specifications.
	Prepare cost estimates, budgets, and tender submissions.
	Analyze supplier quotations and recommend cost-effective solutions.
	Interpret architectural, electrical, and lighting drawings.
	Prepare project reports and documentation.
	Coordinate with clients, consultants, contractors, and vendors.
	Support project execution and monitor project costs.


Requirements


	HND/B.Sc. Degree in Quantity Surveying, Electrical Engineering, Architecture, Building Services, or a related field.
	3&ndash;5 years of relevant experience in lighting projects, estimation, or quantity surveying.
	Proficiency in Dialux Evo.
	Proficiency in AutoCAD and Microsoft Excel.
	Strong knowledge of BOQ preparation, quantity take-offs, and cost estimation.
	Excellent analytical and communication skills.
	Experience in lighting, electrical, or building services projects is highly preferred.
",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-27",

Quantity Surveyor (Dialux & Lighting Design) Job at Accretio Africa




        
    

        
        Accretio Africa, an HR Consulting Firm, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quantity Surveyor (Dialux & Lighting Design)
Job Location: Onikan, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a skilled Quantity Surveyor with hands-on experience in Dialux Evo and lighting project estimation.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for preparing lighting designs, conducting quantity take-offs, developing BOQs, preparing project cost estimates, and supporting the successful execution of lighting projects.


Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop lighting layouts and calculations in line with project requirements.
	Prepare Bills of Quantities (BOQs) and material schedules.
	Conduct quantity take-offs from drawings and specifications.
	Prepare cost estimates, budgets, and tender submissions.
	Analyze supplier quotations and recommend cost-effective solutions.
	Interpret architectural, electrical, and lighting drawings.
	Prepare project reports and documentation.
	Coordinate with clients, consultants, contractors, and vendors.
	Support project execution and monitor project costs.


Requirements


	HND/B.Sc. Degree in Quantity Surveying, Electrical Engineering, Architecture, Building Services, or a related field.
	3–5 years of relevant experience in lighting projects, estimation, or quantity surveying.
	Proficiency in Dialux Evo.
	Proficiency in AutoCAD and Microsoft Excel.
	Strong knowledge of BOQ preparation, quantity take-offs, and cost estimation.
	Excellent analytical and communication skills.
	Experience in lighting, electrical, or building services projects is highly preferred.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "Cheaper Beta Enterprises is fast growing company with focus to provide consumers goods and services at the best market price . We are continually creating an atmosphere for employees to grow.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Onsite)

About the Role


	We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Accountant to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing financial records, ensuring accuracy in reporting, and supporting day-to-day accounting operations.


Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records
	Handle accounts payable and receivable
	Perform bank reconciliations
	Assist in payroll preparation
	Generate financial reports and support audits
	Ensure compliance with financial regulations.


Requirements


	B.Sc. in Accounting or a related field
	2 &ndash; 4 years of relevant accounting experience
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel
	Familiarity with accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage, etc.)
	Strong attention to detail and analytical skills.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: info.cheaperbeta@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more enquires; Whatsapp 09130156117.",

Accountant Job at Cheaper Beta Enterprises




        
    

        
        Cheaper Beta Enterprises is fast growing company with focus to provide consumers goods and services at the best market price . We are continually creating an atmosphere for employees to grow.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Onsite)

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Accountant to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing financial records, ensuring accuracy in reporting, and supporting day-to-day accounting operations.


Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records
	Handle accounts payable and receivable
	Perform bank reconciliations
	Assist in payroll preparation
	Generate financial reports and support audits
	Ensure compliance with financial regulations.


Requirements


	B.Sc. in Accounting or a related field
	2 – 4 years of relevant accounting experience
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel
	Familiarity with accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage, etc.)
	Strong attention to detail and analytical skills.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month. 

Method of Application
